title: Approaches to costing: full, contribution
summary: 9609 AS — full costing vs contribution (marginal) costing.

simpleExplanation.title: Two ways to allocate costs
simpleExplanation.summary: Full costing spreads all overheads into unit cost. Contribution costing only deducts variable costs to find contribution to fixed costs.
steps: Full cost needed for long-run pricing.

sections.content: **Full vs contribution costing** (5.4.2) feeds **break-even 5.4.4**. Know **when each is appropriate**.
